service.name: anthropic
service.description: Anthropic Messages API for Claude language models

intents.description: Create a message using a Claude model

params.name: max_tokens
params.description: The maximum number of tokens to generate

params.name: prompt
params.description: The user message content to send

params.name: system
params.description: System prompt to set context for the conversation

response.description: Message response with generated content, token usage, and stop reason
